name: backstage-plugin-frontend-system-migration
description: Migrates Backstage plugins from the legacy architecture to the new frontend system using the extension-based model.

scripts.test: codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/inventory.ts ./tests/inventory && codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/route-refs && codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/plugin-shell && codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/apis && codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/pages-hooks && codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
